title: senecio cryptocephalus
intro: Senecio cryptocephalus, also known as the 'Wolf's Bane' or 'Blue Devil', is a plant species within the daisy family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its hepatotoxic alkaloids, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Senecio cryptocephalus include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, although its toxicity can be a concern if not used properly. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, but its use requires careful handling and dosing due to its toxic compounds.
